text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I slept super well last night.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka said I went out like a light without even
getting under my blanket, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm so full of pep now! I'm gonna crush
my training today!
